description:
Explore a land filled with lost legends, ancient powers, and ferocious monsters in TUNIC, an isometric action game
about a small fox on a big adventure. Stranded on a mysterious beach, armed with only your own curiosity, you will
confront colossal beasts, collect strange and powerful items, and unravel long-lost secrets. Be brave, tiny fox!

4.2.3.description:
### Backwards compatibility with existing seeds: 
- Archipelago: ✅
  - The tunic.apworld file was updated in this version.
- Single player: ✅(4.2.2 only)

## Changes
- Removed the softlock-escape teleporters in ziggurat/library with shuffled fuses. Players will simply be given the Torch instead.
  - These ended up just being more confusing than they were helpful and with too many edge cases to make them worth maintaining.

## tunic.apworld changes
- Fuse shuffle: Cathedral Elevator fuse no longer marked as progression if entrance rando is on.
- Adjusted rules for being able to pray at Atoll/Swamp fuses to match between fuse shuffle and non-fuse shuffle

## Known Issues
- Entrance rando might not guarantee all rooms to be accessible in the single player rando, and in rare cases the heir might not be reachable. It is recommended to use Archipelago for entrance rando until the next release.
4.2.3.title: Tunic Randomizer 4.2.3

4.2.4.description:
### Backwards compatibility with existing seeds: 
- Archipelago: ✅
  - The tunic apworld has been updated in this version.
- Single player: ❌

# Changes
- Fixed a bug with entrance rando in the single player randomizer. (@ScipioWright)
- Added compatibility with more non-Tunic trap types for Archipelago Trap Link (including Celeste's Zoom and Bald traps). (@ScipioWright)
  - One of those traps might have snuck its way into the normal trap pool as well...
- Added a camera zoom slider when using the fox texture editor.
- Fixed the bush chopping sfx playing everytime you enter the overworld if you had `Clear Early Bushes` turned on.
  
## tunic apworld changes
- ~~Added support for universal tracker's poptracker integration. (@ScipioWright)~~ Some issues were reported with this functionality, we're looking into it!
4.2.4.title: Tunic Randomizer 4.2.4

4.2.5.description:
### Backwards compatibility with existing seeds: 
- Archipelago: ✅
  - The tunic apworld was updated in this version.
- Single player: ❌

# Changes
- Performance improvements when playing grass rando. (#116)
- Fixed a white screen bug with the single player entrance rando. (#118)
- Randomized enemy sizes are now affected by the seeded enemies setting.
- The tunic apworld should now properly work with the universal tracker poptracker integration.
4.2.5.title: Tunic Randomizer 4.2.5

4.2.6.description:
### Backwards compatibility with existing seeds: 
- Archipelago: ✅
- Single player: ✅

# Changes
- Added support for auto-tracking on the [Entrance Tracker website](https://scipiowright.gitlab.io/tunic-tracker/).
  - Auto-tracking only works for Archipelago, but the EntranceTracker.csv file created by the mod can now also be uploaded to the site to sync entrances for single player/non-archipelago seeds.
- Fixed a bug with the zoom trap and trap link (#120 @ScipioWright)
4.2.6.title: Tunic Randomizer 4.2.6

4.2.7.description:
### Backwards compatibility with existing seeds: 
- Multiworlds: ✅
  - The tunic.apworld file was updated in this version.
- Single player: ❌

# Changes
- Fixed a bug where the ending stats screen would show glitched text if grass rando is on
- Fixed an issue where the game would stop receiving items if an incoming item had invalid location data
- Fixed an entrance rando logic bug (single player) [#124 @ScipioWright]
- Fixed a bug where the "fewer shops" entrance rando setting wouldn't apply to a copied seed+settings string
- Minor bugfixes in the tunic.apworld
4.2.7.title: Tunic Randomizer 4.2.7

5.0.0.description: # Version 5.0.0 ### Backwards compatibility with existing seeds: - Single Player Randomizer: ❌ - Archipelago: ⚠️ - The tunic.apworld file was updated in this version. - This update is fully compatible with games generated on Archipelago 0.6.7 and the Archipelago website. - Save files started on Version 4.2.7 can be picked up where they were left off after updating, with the following exception: - For Entrance Rando seeds, set your spawn point at any save statue before updating, otherwise you may encounter a black screen when loading the file on 5.0.0. - If you generate a game using the 5.0.0 apworld, every Tunic player in that game must update to the 5.0.0 mod, even if they're not using the new settings. There are new filler item IDs in the apworld that will cause issue on the old mod. ## Check out everything new on the [Randomizer Website!](https://rando.tunic.run/) # Fox Prince (by @ScipioWright) ### A brand new Entrance Randomizer mode with features inspired by Blue Prince. (Not compatible with Archipelago.) - Every entrance you enter will prompt you with three entrances to choose from. Your choice will then be locked in for that transition for the rest of the seed. - New items have been added in this mode for use when choosing an entrance (dice for re-rolling, darts to pin an entrance for later) - Special thanks to fletchisafurry for their East Forest and Ziggurat map images! # Shuffle Enemy Drops + Shuffle Enemy Souls ### All enemies drop a check when defeated. Available in both Single Player and Archipelago. - Adds around 600 checks, with an additional "extra" option to include New Game+ and Nighttime enemies for ~100 more checks. - **Shuffling Enemy Souls** splits up the progression by making it so enemies do not appear in the world until their corresponding "soul" item is found. (Requires Enemy Drops to be shuffled.) - Poptracker support for enemy checks is in the works for a future update. - Unchecked enemies will have a differently colored Z-Target ring, and can still be found via the Seeking Spell. # Trick & Glitch Logic Toggle ladder storage, ice grappling, and/or laurels shortcuts in logic, with varying levels of difficulty. (These options already existed for Archipelago, but have now been ported to the standalone randomizer) ## Archipelago Updates - Added a "Connect Via Player Link" button on the main menu, which allows you to right click -> copy link on your player name from an Archipelago room page and connect with a single button press. - With the newest apworld, opening the archipelago launcher via the room page will now prompt you to launch either the text client, universal tracker, or TUNIC directly. Launching TUNIC this way will automatically connect you once the game loads to the title screen. - Room passwords do not get populated with the above methods and must still be manually entered. - Death Link messages have been overhauled and now more accurately describe what killed you. - The Laurels and Questagon hints now sync with the Archipelago text client. - Universal Tracker now supports Deferred Entrances for Entrance Rando. - Added fuse locations to the poptracker maps for Universal Tracker - Added location groups for all grass/breakable/enemy checks to the APworld - Minor logic fixes and tweaks in the APworld - Players can no longer be interrupted by other players sending them an item while typing holy cross codes. - Death/Trap Links can no longer be received during the credits - The potion-forming animation will no longer get stuck on repeat while receiving a bunch of items. # Quick Settings Redux ### The randomizer menu has received an overhaul, now providing easy access to every setting found within the mod. # Seeking Spell Options You can now filter what types of checks the seeking spell will search for, including: - In-Logic Checks - Default/Vanilla Checks - Grass - Breakables - Fuses & Bells - Enemies # Misc. Toggles - **CRT Filter**: Render the game with a CRT effect overlay - **Faster Item Queue**: For Archipelago, makes the item queue process faster and skip filler animations when receiving large amounts of items at once. - **Fool Trap Toggles**: You can now set each individual fool trap type to be either on/off/trap link only. There are a handful of new traps that were made specifically for trap link with non-tunic games that can now be enabled for yourself. New trap effects include CRT, Bald, Home (teleports you to overworld), Whoops!, W I D E, Zoom Out, Color Saturation, MP Depletion, Disarm (unequips all items), and Fast (speeds up the game). ## Other Changes & Bugfixes - Reduced the range of the Librarian and Heir swords. - Several optimizations to (hopefully) improve performance of the mod. - Added controller button mappings for the ending screen actions (release/collect/skip credits/hide stats). - The Heir can now be fought in Hexagon Quest. (Note: The logic does not account for this as it would normally.) - Fixed the cathedral elevator disappearing with shuffled fuses. - Added a tuning fork outside of the temple when ladders are shuffled in order to get back down from the upper right path. - Added a light source outside of the Cathedral Secret Legend door to highlight the chest. - Added ladder/fuse decorations near the overworld info sign depending on which is enabled. - The Chalkboard in the Sealed Temple now displays split counts for Overworld and Overworld Interiors. - Added an icon for the laurels-toggle item. - Added a small sfx/animation when unlocked abilities. - Fixed several ghost fox Trunic typos. - Added failsafe for wrong warping and getting stuck out of bounds due to the deathplane patch. - Added launch params to force the TUNC title screen or Mr Mayor mode (`-tunc` and `-mayor`) - Other things I am probably forgetting.
5.0.0.title: TUNIC Randomizer 5.0.0
